# Patent watchlist for jubilant-bassoon.
#
# One assignee per line. Case-insensitive substring match against full XML
# content of USPTO weekly grant + PGPub feeds.
# Lines starting with # are ignored.
#
# Run weekly via .github/workflows/patent-watch.yml on Wednesday 16:00 UTC.

# --- RUM / browser-side performance measurement (PM-26 prior-art space) ---
Dynatrace LLC
Akamai Technologies
Datadog
New Relic
Cisco AppDynamics
Splunk LLC
Tealeaf Technology
SpeedCurve
LogRocket

# --- Sports excitement/notification (RUWT defense) ---
Are You Watching This
RUWT
MetaBet

# --- Sports data + content automation (Data Skrive prior art family) ---
Data Skrive
Stats Perform
Sportradar

# Add more as needed. Re-runs are idempotent.
